disclaimer: Decision-support scaffolding only. Verify every requirement against the solicitation and current official authority; this is not legal advice or a contracting-officer determination.

rules.title: SAM.gov registration
rules.trigger: Always applicable to an offer unless the solicitation states an exception.
rules.check: Confirm the offeror's SAM registration is active when the offer is submitted and at award.

rules.title: Basic safeguarding of contractor systems
rules.trigger: The contractor will process, store, or transmit Federal Contract Information.
rules.check: Confirm the systems handling FCI implement the clause's basic safeguarding requirements.

rules.title: CUI and NIST SP 800-171
rules.trigger: The solicitation references CUI, covered defense information, DFARS 252.204-7012, or NIST SP 800-171.
rules.check: Confirm the offeror can meet the solicitation's specified NIST SP 800-171 revision, reporting, flowdown, assessment, and SPRS obligations.

rules.title: Prohibited telecommunications and video equipment
rules.trigger: Always evaluate unless the solicitation documents an exception or waiver.
rules.check: Confirm representations and supply-chain controls for covered telecommunications equipment or services.

rules.title: Set-aside eligibility
rules.authority: FAR Part 19 and the solicitation set-aside designation
rules.trigger: The solicitation is set aside for a small-business or socioeconomic program.
rules.check: Confirm size under the stated NAICS code and the current certification required by the set-aside.

rules.title: Limitations on subcontracting
rules.trigger: The clause applies to the set-aside and the offeror plans to subcontract.
rules.check: Confirm the offeror will not pay more than the applicable percentage to subcontractors that are not similarly situated entities, using the clause's category-specific calculation.

rules.title: Section 508 accessibility
rules.trigger: Deliverables include ICT such as software, websites, or electronic documents.
rules.check: Confirm applicable Revised 508 Standards, testing, and requested ACR or VPAT deliverables can be met.

rules.title: Federal AI governance requirements
rules.authority: OMB M-25-21 as implemented by the solicitation
rules.trigger: The work includes agency use of AI and the solicitation invokes high-impact AI or related governance controls.
rules.check: Confirm required impact, testing, monitoring, human oversight, privacy, civil-rights, and risk-management artifacts can be delivered.

rules.title: AI acquisition terms
rules.authority: OMB M-25-22 as implemented by the solicitation
rules.trigger: The acquisition includes an AI system or service.
rules.check: Confirm performance measurement, data rights, privacy, interoperability, documentation, competition, and vendor-lock-in provisions can be met.

rules.title: Submission format compliance
rules.trigger: Always evaluate the solicitation's submission instructions.
rules.check: Confirm page limits, file formats, volume structure, signatures, delivery method, and deadlines are owned and achievable.

rules.title: Questions deadline
rules.check: Confirm identified ambiguities can be submitted before the stated questions deadline.

rules.title: Key personnel and clearances
rules.trigger: The requirements include named personnel, certifications, or clearances.
rules.check: Confirm required personnel, certifications, letters of commitment, and clearances can be staffed by the required date.

rules.title: Past performance references
rules.trigger: Past performance is an evaluation factor.
rules.check: Confirm the required number, recency, relevance, magnitude, and reference-contact requirements can be met.

rules.title: CMMC level and status
rules.trigger: The solicitation includes a required CMMC level or the CMMC notice and compliance clauses.
rules.check: Confirm the offeror and applicable information systems have the required current CMMC status, UID, affirmations, and subcontract flowdowns.
